channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly Tip, 6th April
item.description:
Loads of rubbish on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Farm Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking across dropped kirb, 6th April
item.description:
As per the picture this vehicle continually parks across thos dropped kirb making it impossible to gain access to the drives it provides access to. There are spaces to park opposite but they choose to park as close to outside there property as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moorside Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of garden waste left for 2 months, 6th April
item.description:
Someone has left a pile of garden waste blocking on of the few parking spaces in Chilver Street and it has been left untouched for 2 months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chilver Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Linthorpe Road N16 needs cleaning properly 2, 6th April
item.description:
Tree bases from top to bottom, gutters, pavements all need to be cleaned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Linthorpe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Linthorpe N16 Hackney cleaning properly, 6th April
item.description:
Tree bases, gutters, and pavements need cleaning of all rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Linthorpe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 157 king Henry’s Road, 6th April
item.description:
40 foot tree at 157 king Henry’s Road seems to be leaning on cracked wall as possibly the trees only form of support, if so then tree would fall straight into road as is already in that direction , wall is also cracked under weight of tree
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 155, King Henry's Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human feces, 6th April
item.description:
Whilst out delivering leaflets the stairwell between the 1st and ground floor has human feces in the corner. It’s causing flies and smells very bad

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanworth Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on pavement, 6th April
item.description:
Mattress dumped on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conway Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bin bus stop G - Nightingale Place, 6th April
item.description:
Litter bin as per last report ref: 9232119 date: 2nd April is still not been emptied 6th April. Now spilling out on South Circular and adjacent pavement next to bus stop. I know there has been Easter Bank Holiday, but this a busy bus stop next to a large residential blocks of flats, and in normal weeks is emptied three times per week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Common, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car on Malvern rd, 6th April
item.description:
This car was abandoned by truck directly across the street then later moved to the current location. Has been present for at least three weeks prior to the date of this report.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albion Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sewage overflow from drains outside Weybridge House, Woodberry Down Estate, N4 1QJ, 6th April
item.description:
Foul water/sewage is rising from drain covers on the road outside Weybridge House. It has spread across the road and footpath used by residents. The area smells of sewage and is a health risk, especially for children.This has been ongoing for several weeks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard and rubbish bag, 6th April
item.description:
In the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish constantly left outside garage, 6th April
item.description:
By the alleyway leading to Amhurst Walk on Roman Square there is a build up of boxes and discarded rubbish left outside garage. They have been here for about 2 weeks but it keeps being added too every day and is just a growing pile of rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roman Square, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish constantly left outside garage, 6th April
item.description:
By the alleyway leading to Amhurst Walk on Roman Square there is a build up of boxes and discarded rubbish left outside garage. They have been here for about 2 weeks but it keeps being added too every day and is just a growing pile of rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roman Square, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded Sofa - 7th Floor, Communal Area - Helen Gladstone House, 6th April
item.description:
Within the communal stairwell, on the 7th floor a discarded sofa. Needs removal

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nelson Square, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in bushes, 6th April

Flytipping in bushes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Road, Woolwich

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Road, Woolwich

item.title: Out of date information on Community Notice Board - date 2017, 6th April
item.description:
Helen Gladstone House Information within notice board dating back to 2017 & 2019 - all out of date

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nelson Square, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in sidewalk, 6th April
item.description:
The door that locks the Sandway Road bin has been open for people to pile their rubbish on which is not overflowing onto the sidewalk and main road. The Bin is close to Oldbury close bus stop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 192-216, Sandway Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trash and waste on the bridge in front of German hospital, 6th April
item.description:
There are dead animal skulls, food waste, trees, etc.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Madinah Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
